'''âk-h-sh''' ('''kakahash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babymaxx|babymaxx]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babymaxx|babymaxx]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kakahash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikahash|thikahash]] || [[word:jikahash|jikahash]] || [[word:shikahash|shikahash]] || [[word:kikahash|kikahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukahash|thuthukahash]] || [[word:jujukahash|jujukahash]] || [[word:shushukahash|shushukahash]] || [[word:kukukahash|kukukahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukahash|thukahash]] || [[word:jukahash|jukahash]] || [[word:shukahash|shukahash]] || [[word:kukahash|kukahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukahash|thukahash]] || [[word:jukahash|jukahash]] || [[word:shukahash|shukahash]] || [[word:kukahash|kukahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekahash|thekahash]] || [[word:jekahash|jekahash]] || [[word:shekahash|shekahash]] || [[word:kekahash|kekahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokahash|thothokahash]] || [[word:jojokahash|jojokahash]] || [[word:shoshokahash|shoshokahash]] || [[word:kokokahash|kokokahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokahash|thokahash]] || [[word:jokahash|jokahash]] || [[word:shokahash|shokahash]] || [[word:kokahash|kokahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokahash|thokahash]] || [[word:jokahash|jokahash]] || [[word:shokahash|shokahash]] || [[word:kokahash|kokahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkahash|thĂŠkahash]] || [[word:jĂŠkahash|jĂŠkahash]] || [[word:shĂŠkahash|shĂŠkahash]] || [[word:kĂŠkahash|kĂŠkahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakahash|thathakahash]] || [[word:jajakahash|jajakahash]] || [[word:shashakahash|shashakahash]] || [[word:kakakahash|kakakahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakahash|thakahash]] || [[word:jakahash|jakahash]] || [[word:shakahash|shakahash]] || [[word:kakahash|kakahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakahash|thakahash]] || [[word:jakahash|jakahash]] || [[word:shakahash|shakahash]] || [[word:kakahash|kakahash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakahash|shakahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakahash|goshakahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakahash|gokishakahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakahashnĂŒ|shakahashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakahashnknĂŒ|goshakahashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahashnĂŒ|gokishakahashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakahashĂ«|shakahashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakahashnkshĂ«|goshakahashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakahashĂ«|gokishakahashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahashro|shakahashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahashnkro|goshakahashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahashro|gokishakahashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahashmu|shakahashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahashnkmu|goshakahashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahashmu|gokishakahashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakahasher|shakahasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakahashnksher|goshakahashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakahasher|gokishakahasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakahashng|shakahashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakahashnkng|goshakahashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakahashng|gokishakahashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakahashya|shakahashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakahashnkya|goshakahashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakahashya|gokishakahashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakahashyam|shakahashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakahashnkyam|goshakahashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakahashyam|gokishakahashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahashnĂŒshĂ«|shakahashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakahashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakahashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahashnĂŒro|shakahashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahashnknĂŒro|goshakahashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahashnĂŒro|gokishakahashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahashnĂŒmu|shakahashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahashnknĂŒmu|goshakahashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahashnĂŒmu|gokishakahashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahashĂ«nĂŒ|shakahashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakahashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakahashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahashĂ«ro|shakahashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahashnkshĂ«ro|goshakahashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahashĂ«ro|gokishakahashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahashĂ«mu|shakahashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahashnkshĂ«mu|goshakahashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahashĂ«mu|gokishakahashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahashronĂŒ|shakahashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahashnkronĂŒ|goshakahashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahashronĂŒ|gokishakahashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahashroshĂ«|shakahashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahashnkroshĂ«|goshakahashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahashroshĂ«|gokishakahashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahashromu|shakahashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahashnkromu|goshakahashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahashromu|gokishakahashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahashmunĂŒ|shakahashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahashnkmunĂŒ|goshakahashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahashmunĂŒ|gokishakahashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahashmushĂ«|shakahashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahashnkmushĂ«|goshakahashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahashmushĂ«|gokishakahashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahashmuro|shakahashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahashnkmuro|goshakahashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahashmuro|gokishakahashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
